Add Custom Certificate

Add a certificate that isn't in the standard template — e.g. a company-specific training, ECDIS type-specific course, local endorsement, or an extra course you took.

Maritime Document Management

version 0.4.146

New vault folders are named clearly, for example Skipi Seafarer - Tymur Rudov. When opening a vault, select that named folder.
Just exploring? Load demo seafarer

Complete your Seafarer Profile

These details are required before you can start using Skipi Seafarer. They live only inside this vault on disk. Photo is optional.

A new version of Skipi Seafarer is available! ✕
